non_calculation_calls_llm.description: When validation pipeline is disabled, non-calculation queries still call the LLM as before.

calculation_success_bypasses_llm.description: Calculation EXECUTED still bypasses LLM when validation is disabled.

calculation_blocked_bypasses_llm.description: Calculation BLOCKED still bypasses LLM when validation is disabled.

front_matter_title_still_works.description: Front matter title query still returns deterministic answer without LLM.

trace_id_propagation.description: Trace ID is still propagated to the response when validation is enabled.

orchestrator_receives_same_args.description: Orchestrator receives the same arguments regardless of validation pipeline enablement.

default_engine_has_calculation_pipeline.description: Default RAGEngine has calculation pipeline enabled.

default_engine_has_validation_pipeline.description: Default RAGEngine has validation pipeline enabled (enable_validation_pipeline=True).

disable_validation_pipeline.description: Validation pipeline can be disabled via constructor flag.
